data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an 'Identity handoff audit trail' as part of the booking transfer contract. However, the prior evidence does not provide any confirmation of such an audit trail existing or being linked to the booking process. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to support the requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of an identity handoff audit trail linked to the booking transfer process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
